notes: Menu captured for The Masonry Queen Anne (not Fremont as labeled — address is 20 Roy St, Queen Anne). Lunch menu is a subset of dinner; dishes deduplicated where identical. Bottle/tap beer list not captured. Some items marked with * likely indicate nut allergen warnings rather than dietary tags.

dishes.name: Margherita
dishes.description: Tomato sauce, garlic & mozzarella, basil, olive oil, Maldon sea salt. Add burrata +$7.

dishes.name: Pepperoni
dishes.description: Tomato sauce, garlic & aged mozz, provolone, pepperoni, oregano. Add hot honey +$2.

dishes.name: Mushroom
dishes.description: Olive oil, garlic & taleggio, fresh mozz, crimini mushrooms, lemon, thyme. Add pancetta +$4.

dishes.name: Mystic Pizza
dishes.description: Tomato sauce, four cheese, pepperoni, sausage, pepperoncini, jazz dust, parsley. Add ranch +$2.

dishes.name: Captain Whatshisname
dishes.description: Chili oil, olive oil, shallot, garlic, slow roasted birria, aged mozz, onion, cilantro, lime, cotija, aleppo, served with a shot of consommé.

dishes.name: Ginny's Pizza
dishes.description: Olive oil base, sausage, caramelized onions, fresh mozz, smoked buffalo mozz, parsley.

dishes.name: Buona Madre
dishes.description: Tomato sauce, garlic, shallot & fresh mozzarella, sausage, Mama Lil's peppers, grana, oregano.

dishes.name: Vegan Marinara
dishes.description: Tomato sauce, garlic & oregano, chili oil, Maldon sea salt. Add arugula +$2.

dishes.name: Big Cheese
dishes.description: Tomato sauce, garlic & aged mozz, provolone, grana, oregano, black pepper.

dishes.name: Al Diavolo
dishes.description: Tomato sauce, garlic & fresh mozzarella, soppressata, hot peppers, hot honey, oregano.

dishes.name: Caesar Salad
dishes.description: Romaine, focaccia crouton, parmesan. Add anchovies +$2.

dishes.name: Catty King
dishes.description: Arugula, snap peas, fennel, orange, shaved parm, watermelon radish, pine nuts, lemon-dill vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Meatballs
dishes.description: Beef, pork, turkey, grana, pecorino, breadcrumb, red pepper, mirepoix; a lil' spicy.

dishes.name: Garlic Cheese Bread
dishes.description: House-made garlic butter, 4 cheese blend, provolone, grana, oregano, parsley and jazz dust. Comes with choice of marinara sauce or meatball sauce. Add pepperoni +$2.

dishes.name: House-Made Focaccia
dishes.description: Served with oil & vinegar.

dishes.name: Pickled Vegetables
dishes.description: Carrot, onion, cauliflower, zucchini & red pepper.

dishes.name: Shishitos
dishes.description: Roasted shishito peppers, served with 'good good not bad' dipping sauce.

dishes.name: Wood Fired Broccolini
dishes.description: Romesco, breadcrumb.

dishes.name: Roasted Bar Nuts
dishes.description: Pistachio, cashew, cayenne, smoked paprika, chili powder, black pepper, salt.

dishes.name: Tiramisu
dishes.description: Cream, chocolate, espresso, rum, cookies.

dishes.name: Basque Cheesecake
dishes.description: With macerated thyme blueberries.

dishes.name: Cookie
dishes.description: Warm, house-made chocolate chip & pecan cookie. Add a scoop of vanilla ice cream +$2.
dishes.price_note: Add scoop of vanilla ice cream +$2
